summary: Complete e2e testing of EL&BE restaurant website. All backend APIs and frontend features working perfectly. Tested hero section with bar photo and logo, multilingual menu (RO/EN/HU), cart functionality, full checkout flow, order confirmation, and contact section with Google Maps.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/menu (95 items, 16 categories)
Backend: POST /api/orders (order creation with correct totals)
Backend: GET /api/orders/{id} (order retrieval)
Backend: POST /api/checkout/session (Stripe integration)
Frontend: Hero section loads with bar photo background and EL&BE logo badge
Frontend: Menu section displays all items with category filtering
Frontend: Category filters work (Burger: 10 items, Pizza: 14 items, Dessert: 4 items)
Frontend: Add items to cart with proper counter updates (0→1→2)
Frontend: Language switching RO/EN/HU - menu title changes correctly
Frontend: Cart navigation to checkout page
Frontend: Checkout page shows order summary with quantity controls
Frontend: Quantity +/- buttons work correctly
Frontend: Item removal from cart works
Frontend: Checkout form accepts customer details
Frontend: Cash payment method selection
Frontend: Order placement and confirmation page
Frontend: Order confirmation shows ID, total, status, pickup location
Frontend: Contact section shows correct address (380 Principala, 457085 Crasna)
Frontend: Phone number displayed (031 630 9962)
Frontend: Opening hours displayed
Frontend: Google Maps iframe properly embedded
Frontend: Footer contains EL&BE logo and contact info
Frontend: Navigation buttons (Menu/Contact) work correctly
